name: KlarnaUSD
launchPhaseDetail: Tempo mainnet live since March 18; KlarnaUSD still on testnet; Bridge OCC charter approved Feb 2026; mainnet deployment could come at any time

milestones.title: Klarna announces KlarnaUSD, first bank stablecoin on Tempo
milestones.description: Built on Bridge (Stripe) Open Issuance infrastructure. 114M customers, $112B annual GMV as adoption base.

milestones.title: Built on Bridge (Stripe) Open Issuance; first bank token on Tempo blockchain
Live on Tempo testnet for early integration and prototyping
Bridge (Stripe subsidiary) receives conditional OCC national bank trust charter
milestones.description: Approval enables Bridge to custody crypto assets, issue stablecoins, and manage reserves as a federally regulated entity.

milestones.title: Tempo mainnet launches; KlarnaUSD not yet migrated from testnet
milestones.description: Tempo L1 goes live with sub-second finality, Machine Payments Protocol for AI agents, and partners including Anthropic, Mastercard, Visa, and Revolut. Klarna absent from mainnet launch partners.
